reason: Browser use feature successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title, and reported "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with the SuperAgent interface showing sidebar with agents list
Clicked on agent "QA-20260526-220649-shi9" in the sidebar — Agent chat interface opened with message input ready
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was sent and agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed work in 13 seconds and provided response with the text "The page title is \"Example Domain\"."

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "Example Domain" with successful tool calls (ToolSearch, Open Browser, Browser MCP: Browser Get State, Close Browser)
